name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the pain point or workflow gap, not the proposed implementation. -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Optional. If you have an idea for *how*, share it — but the "why" matters more. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Tools or workarounds you've tried, and why they fell short. -->

## Scope

- [ ] This belongs in v1 (Laravel-only MVP)
- [ ] This belongs in v1.1 (post-MVP polish — see [docs/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/ROADMAP.md))
- [ ] This belongs in v2+ (Symfony / WordPress / async / production / etc.)

## Additional context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar features in other tools. -->
